postSubmissionChangeNote: Reserve allocation changed after the original 2026-05-09 BaseScan submission; the 2026-05-13 resubmission used the updated public values.
ownerReserveCustodyNote: The 600,000,000 GCA reserve is held in a normal owner-controlled wallet. It is not a lock, vesting contract, or multisig.
description: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token deployed on Base Mainnet. GCA currently stands for Go China Access, a concept-stage community direction focused on the Go China macro narrative, bilingual Web3 education, public market research, and planned access to non-custodial quant risk tools. The public GCA AI Quant Access product spec describes the intended access and membership layer for reports, risk-warning credits, backtests, ENTRY_READY signal review, position-size calculators, subscription discounts, and risk-control training. The contract creates 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls.
officialEmailNote: Official public project email listed on gcagochina.com. The original reply inbox was a non-domain legacy inbox and must not be reused for new submissions.
